subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! The letter dated the fifth of Rajab 1325 was received, and from its contents [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه که بتاریخ ۵ رجب سنه ۱۳۲۵ مورخ بود رسید بسیار از مضمونش
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consolation and comfort
